hero.headline:
Baked with 
Fire & Soul.
hero.subtext: Authentic flavors, homemade ingredients, and traditional recipes served warm everyday.

story.headline: The secret is in the simplicity. Water, flour, time, and fire.
story.body: At Ãlo Oven, we bring the authentic taste of Lebanon to our community with fresh, simple food made the traditional way. Every day we prepare favorites like Manoushe, warm Ka'ak, hearty Foul Medames, and comforting Fatteh using homemade ingredients and time-honored recipes, creating flavors that feel just like home.

menu.name: Za'atar Manouche
menu.desc: The classic. Dried wild thyme, roasted sesame seeds, sumac, and rich virgin olive oil.

menu.name: Akkawi Cheese
menu.desc: A melting pool of soft, creamy Levantine cheese with a mild, satisfyingly salty finish.

menu.name: Lebanese Keshek
menu.desc: Preserved dried yogurt, crushed wheat, ripe tomatoes, and finely diced onions.

menu.name: Meat Manoushi
menu.desc: Minced spiced beef blended with fresh tomatoes and onions, baked until crisp and aromatic.

menu.name: Halloumi Cheese
menu.desc: The delightful combination of salty and savory artisan halloumi, baked to a golden crust.

menu.name: Muhammara Manoushi
menu.desc: Diced tomatoes, onions, and our signature traditional sweet and spicy pepper blend.
